title: feat: approve apps before PR creation
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: The VIP list for apps
gist.blurb: We've streamlined how community apps get added to the showcase. Our AI now prepares a neat preview, and with one quick approval stamp from a maintainer, your app is officially in the garden.
gist.summary: Refactored the app submission GitHub workflow to require human approval via a label before the AI automatically creates and merges the pull request.
gist.impact: Contributors submitting apps will now see an AI-generated preview on their issue, which automatically converts to a merged PR once a maintainer gives the green light.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about reviewing and approving apps before they enter the repository. Visual metaphor: Polly the bee acting as a friendly reviewer or gatekeeper, checking a clipboard or holding an approval stamp, while the AI robot presents a new app submission.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses and holding a green 'APPROVED' stamp. A chunky pixel robot with a monitor head stands nearby, eagerly holding up a glowing digital blueprint. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
